title: Goblins & Dungeons
description: Goblins & Dungeons is a mod about dungeons and mythical creatures, with the purpose of giving the player a more complete and adventurous story throughout the game. The mod is mainly inspired by D&D type of RPG’s and the whole concept of dungeons.
body:
Goblins & Dungeons is a mod based on the popular tabletop RPG Dungeons & Dragons, as well as other tabletop RPGs. We aim to add a unique experience to the game with interesting mobs, structures, and items, while also trying not to stray too far from the vanilla feel. 

 

Current content includes:

7 new regular enemies, ranging from the basic Gob and the ranged Garch, to the rare Goom and Mimic!
1 mini-boss, the giant Ogre!
1 boss, the Goblin King, who will fire Soul Bullets at the player!
4 new structures, including different sized Goblin Camps and a Ruined Keep!
And more!
